name: pi-package-goal
description: Pi package bundling high-signal engineering skills, opt-in Pi UX extensions, and Understand slash-command bridges.

scripts.test: npm run test:package && npm run test:extensions && npm run test:assets && npm run test:goal
scripts.test:package: node tests/validate-package.mjs && node tests/pi-bridge-lifecycle.test.mjs && node tests/pi-bridge-command-grammar.test.mjs && node tests/candidates-folder-refactor.test.mjs && node tests/skill-helper-scripts.test.mjs && node tests/clean-context-delegation.test.mjs
scripts.test:extensions: node tests/folder-refactor-extension.test.mjs && node tests/rtk-extension.test.mjs && node tests/ponytail-extension.test.mjs && node tests/understand-extension.test.mjs && node tests/goal-extension-command.test.mjs && node tests/goal-technical-auditor-command.test.mjs
scripts.test:goal: node tests/development-goal-report-parser.test.mjs && node tests/development-goal-final-report-gate.test.mjs && node tests/development-goal-worktree-risk.test.mjs && node tests/development-goal-validation-receipts.test.mjs && node tests/development-goal-terminal-audit.test.mjs && node tests/development-goal-lib-architecture.test.mjs
